posts.author: Berdien_Paeye (Berdien)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

It would be nice that instead of having to copy paste an e-mail, to just drag the email in attachment and it would capture it.

What are you trying to achieve

At the moment we copy paste e-mails to capture the feedback, Okay’s to a project etc. This is to log when we got approval. It would take less time to just drag and drop the e-mail in attachement. Certainly when there are pictures in an e-mail, when copy pasting it those get lost in notes. When the email itself is attatched nothing gets lost.
